title: Supply Demand Dynamics
summary:
Main
Dry Weekly Market Monitor - Week 25.2024 Snapshot of Spot Freight Rates, Supply-Demand Trends, Port Congestions June 19, 2024
In the third week of June, significant developments are observed in the Capesize vessel rates on the Brazil to North China route, as well as in the Panamax Cont FE routes, indicating a stronger momentum for larger vessel size segments as we approach the end of the month. Specifically, the Panamax P6 route in ECSA shows promising signs for the firming of freight rates in the coming days, supported by a notable decrease in the number of ballast vessels from their peaks in mid-February and before mid-March. Looking ahead, June appears poised to conclude with an upward trend in the growth of dry bulk demand tonne days.
